purpose: Lightweight routing + output-contract fixtures for news-monitoring. Specs, not executed live in CI; validated by tests/test_routing_fixtures.py. They capture when recurring/monitoring requests belong here vs. one-off research, and what a digest must contain.

fixtures.request: Set up a digest of AI-policy news and send it to me every Monday morning.

expected_routing.reason: Recurring, scheduled monitoring with delivery — the core of news-monitoring (cron + digest).

fixtures.request: Track Hong Kong student-housing news in both English and Chinese and give me the top items each fortnight.

expected_routing.reason: Ongoing multi-language topic monitoring with periodic delivery.

fixtures.request: Give me a one-off, in-depth report on how AI regulation has evolved globally, with citations.

expected_routing.reason: A single comprehensive cited report (not recurring) is deep-research, not monitoring.

fixtures.request: Find me good recent YouTube videos explaining the EU AI Act.

expected_routing.reason: Finding/summarizing videos for a topic is youtube-topic-research, not text news monitoring.
